content: Absolute failure of service and support. I've been stranded for nearly two hours. The driver accepted the trip but hasn't moved or canceled. To make it worse, there is no effective way to contact support and absolutely no answer. Why is there zero oversight? A booking with zero driver movement for two hours should be automatically flagged. I trusted this app, but they completely failed me. Unacceptable.
